name: CRUD/conditional-create
description: Conditional create (POST with If-None-Exist) conformance tests: create-on-no-match, short-circuit-on-one-match, 412 on multiple matches, 400 on empty criteria, and Prefer header handling on a matched create.

variable.name: seedOneMatchId
variable.description: Server-assigned id of the Observation unconditionally created in setup that carries identifier CC-ONEMATCH

operation.description: Unconditionally create the Observation that later conditional-create attempts should match exactly once (CC-ONEMATCH)
Unconditionally create the first of two Observations sharing identifier CC-MULTI
Unconditionally create the second of two Observations sharing identifier CC-MULTI

test.name: Conditional create with no existing match creates a new resource
test.description: POST /Observation with an If-None-Exist header matching no existing resource; the server must create a new Observation and return 201 Created.

assert.description: Response body must be an Observation
Server must have assigned an id

test.name: Conditional create with exactly one existing match returns the existing resource
test.description: POST /Observation with an If-None-Exist header matching exactly one existing Observation; the server must short-circuit and return 200 OK with the existing resource instead of creating a new one.

operation.description: Conditional POST /Observation, If-None-Exist matches the single seeded CC-ONEMATCH Observation

assert.description: Must return HTTP 200 OK (matched, not created)
Response body must be an Observation
Returned id must be the id of the existing seeded resource, not a new one

test.name: Conditional create with an empty If-None-Exist criteria is rejected
test.description: POST /Observation with an empty If-None-Exist header value; the server must reject the request with 400 Bad Request.

operation.description: Conditional POST /Observation with a blank If-None-Exist header

test.name: Conditional create with multiple existing matches fails
test.description: POST /Observation with an If-None-Exist header matching two existing Observations; the server must return 412 Precondition Failed since the criteria isn't selective enough.

operation.description: Conditional POST /Observation, If-None-Exist matches both seeded CC-MULTI Observations

test.name: Conditional create match honors Prefer: return=OperationOutcome
test.description: Conditional create matching one existing Observation with Prefer: return=OperationOutcome; the 200 OK response body must be an OperationOutcome, not the matched resource.

operation.description: Conditional POST /Observation matching CC-ONEMATCH with Prefer: return=OperationOutcome

assert.description: Must return HTTP 200 OK (matched, not created)
Response body must be an OperationOutcome per the Prefer header

test.name: Conditional create rejects an invalid Prefer preference value
test.description: Conditional create matching one existing Observation with an invalid Prefer header value (return= with no preference); the server must reject the request with 400 Bad Request.

operation.description: Conditional POST /Observation matching CC-ONEMATCH with an invalid Prefer header value
Teardown: conditional delete the CC-NOMATCH Observation created by the tests
Teardown: conditional delete the CC-ONEMATCH Observation
Teardown: conditional delete both CC-MULTI Observations
